title: sync.json
description: Config for scripts/sync.ts — which local files to mirror into this repo, by group.

groups.description: Named groups of entries to sync.

oneOf.description: Shorthand: a path relative to BOTH $HOME and the repo root, copied verbatim (e.g. ".config/cmux/cmux.json").

from.description: Source path relative to $HOME. Defaults to `to` when omitted. Ignored if `cmd` is set.

to.description: Destination path relative to the repo root.

cmd.description: Run this shell command and write its stdout to `to`, instead of copying a file.
